---
title: "nitrix.stats.inference.permutation"
generated: true
signature-hash: 230d3a269fbf9c71
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.inference.permutation`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_perm` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `sign_flips` {#sign_flips}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:sign_flips -->
```python
sign_flips(n: int, n_perm: int, key: Array, *, blocks: Optional[Int[Array, 'N']] = None) -> Float[Array, 'n_perm N']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:sign_flips -->
`(n_perm, n)` matrix of `+/-1` sign flips (row 0 = identity).

Without `blocks` each observation flips independently; with `blocks`
every observation in a block shares the block's sign (whole-block flip).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:sign_flips -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `n` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `n_perm` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `key` | `Array` | — | — | — |
| `blocks` | `Optional[Int[Array, 'N']]` | — | `None` | — |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `n_perm` × `N`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `permutations` {#permutations}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:permutations -->
```python
permutations(n: int, n_perm: int, key: Array, *, blocks: Optional[Int[Array, 'N']] = None) -> Int[Array, 'n_perm N']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:permutations -->
`(n_perm, n)` permutation-index matrix (row 0 = identity).

Without `blocks` rows are free permutations of `0..n-1`; with `blocks`
each row is a *within-block* permutation (observation `i` maps only to a
position sharing its block label).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:permutations -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `n` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `n_perm` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `key` | `Array` | — | — | — |
| `blocks` | `Optional[Int[Array, 'N']]` | — | `None` | — |

**Returns** `Int` — shape `n_perm` × `N`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
